openmeter/notification/webhook/svix/inte.purpose: Internal Svix error translation layer: converts raw *svix.Error HTTP responses into typed webhook error categories (retryable, unrecoverable, not-found, validation) consumed by the svix webhook handler. Single-responsibility package — error mapping only.

patterns.name: SvixError wraps to domain error via Wrap()
patterns.description: SvixError.Wrap() maps HTTP status codes to webhook.NewRetryableError, webhook.NewUnrecoverableError, webhook.NewNotFoundError, or returns raw SvixError for unrecognized statuses. Always call .Wrap() after constructing SvixError.

patterns.name: WrapSvixError is the entry-point for callers
patterns.description: All Svix API call sites must pass errors through WrapSvixError(err) which type-asserts to *svix.Error via lo.ErrorsAs and dispatches to status-specific JSON unmarshal + SvixError construction. Never construct SvixError directly from outside this package.
patterns.example: if err := WrapSvixError(svixAPIErr); err != nil { return err }

patterns.name: 422 UnprocessableEntity uses SvixValidationErrorBody
patterns.description: HTTP 422 responses from Svix carry a detail array of SvixValidationError structs; all other statuses carry a flat SvixErrorBody. Unmarshal branch must be kept in sync with Svix's actual response shapes.
patterns.example: case http.StatusUnprocessableEntity: var body SvixValidationErrorBody; json.Unmarshal(svixErr.Body(), &body)

patterns.name: Rate-limit carries RetryAfter duration
patterns.description: 429 Too Many Requests and 5xx server errors are wrapped as webhook.NewRetryableError(e, e.RetryAfter). The RetryAfter field must be populated by callers parsing the Retry-After response header before constructing SvixError.

key_file_guides.role: Defines SvixError value type, its Wrap() HTTP-status-to-domain-error mapping, JSON body structs for Svix error responses, and the WrapSvixError public entry-point.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a new HTTP status mapping requires a new case in both SvixError.Wrap() and WrapSvixError's switch. Missing a status silently returns the raw SvixError without domain wrapping, bypassing retry/unrecoverable classification.

anti_patterns: Returning *svix.Error directly to callers outside this package — always go through WrapSvixError
Adding business logic or Svix API calls to this package — it is error-mapping only
Unmarshaling Svix response body outside this package and duplicating the JSON struct definitions
Treating all Svix errors as retryable — 4xx validation errors must be wrapped as unrecoverable to avoid infinite retry loops

decisions.decision: Separate internal package for Svix error translation
decisions.rationale: Keeps *svix.Error (an SDK type) from leaking into the domain webhook package. The internal boundary enforces that callers only see webhook.RetryableError / webhook.UnrecoverableError / webhook.NotFoundError — domain-portable error types.

decisions.decision: HTTP status drives retry vs unrecoverable classification
decisions.rationale: Svix 4xx (400, 409, 422) indicate caller-side data problems that will not resolve on retry; 429 and 5xx are transient. Encoding this in Wrap() keeps retry logic out of the notification consumer.

code_examples.scenario: Wrapping a Svix API error at a call site in the svix webhook handler
